name_cn:
Genuine leather
Loewe upgraded Flamenco Medium
New version
Commonly known as the knot bag (keychain, order separately)
Selected soft and delicate calfskin, tightened with a drawstring, and finished with the iconic twisted knot. Shoulder, crossbody, or clutch. Removable and adjustable shoulder strap. Magnetic closure. Suede leather lining. 30-24.5-10.5
Model 11050A
